tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Instrumental]
[ch]Bbm7[/ch] [ch]Fmadd4/Ab[/ch] [ch]G7#5[/ch] [ch]Ebmadd4/Gb[/ch] [ch]F7#5[/ch] [ch]Emaj7b5[/ch] [ch]Ebsus[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch] [ch]Fmadd4/Ab[/ch] [ch]G7#5[/ch] [ch]Ebmadd4/Gb[/ch] [ch]F7#5[/ch] [ch]Emaj7b5[/ch]
                                             Come...[/tab]
[ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]          [ch]Eb[/ch]     [ch]Fm7[/ch]   [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
[ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]          [ch]Eb[/ch]     [ch]Fm7[/ch]   [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
[ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]          [ch]Eb[/ch]     [ch]Fm7[/ch]   [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
[ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]          [ch]Eb[/ch]     [ch]Fm7add4[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]          [ch]Eb[/ch]     [ch]Fm7[/ch]   [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
Looking through my old drawer[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]            [ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]Fm7[/ch]   [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
Came across the letter you wrote[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]           [ch]Eb[/ch]   [ch]Fm7[/ch]   [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
Said you needed time away[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]      [ch]Eb[/ch]   [ch]Fm7[/ch]
That was so long ago[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch] [ch]Fmadd4/Ab[/ch] [ch]G7#5[/ch]         [ch]Ebmadd4/Gb[/ch] [ch]F7#5[/ch]
All     my     life, I've waited[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Emaj7b5[/ch]          [ch]Ebsus[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch]
To see your smile again[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch] [ch]Fmadd4/Ab[/ch] [ch]G7#5[/ch]         [ch]Ebmadd4/Gb[/ch] [ch]F7#5[/ch]
In    my       mind, I've     hated[/tab]
[tab][ch]Emaj7b5[/ch]
Not able to let go[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]
Come back to me[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Fm7[/ch]         [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
I'm begging you please[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]
Come back to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch] [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
  I want you to[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]
Come back to me[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Fm7[/ch]         [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
I'm begging you please[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]Fm7add4[/ch]
Come back to me[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]          [ch]Eb[/ch]       [ch]Fm7[/ch]   [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
Lord knows that I have tried[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]      [ch]Eb[/ch]     [ch]Fm7[/ch]   [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
To live my life as one[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]          [ch]Eb[/ch]        [ch]Fm7[/ch]   [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
Friends tell me to hold on[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]               [ch]Eb[/ch]     [ch]Fm7[/ch]
Tough times don't last for long[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch] [ch]Fmadd4/Ab[/ch] [ch]G7#5[/ch]  [ch]Ebmadd4/Gb[/ch] [ch]F7#5[/ch]
My        ab-andoned heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]Emaj7b5[/ch]            [ch]Ebsus[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch]
Just doesn't understand[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch] [ch]Fmadd4/Ab[/ch] [ch]G7#5[/ch] [ch]Ebmadd4/Gb[/ch] [ch]F7#5[/ch]
My         un-dying love for   you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Emaj7b5[/ch]
Won't let me wait[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]
Come back to me[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Fm7[/ch]         [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
I'm begging you please[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]
Come back to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch] [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
  I want you to[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]
Come back to me[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Fm7[/ch]         [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
I'm begging you please[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]
Come back to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch] [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
  I want you to[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Eb[/ch]   [ch]Fm7[/ch] [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
Come   back  to  me (Come back to me)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Eb[/ch]
Come back[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch] [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
I want you to[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Eb[/ch]   [ch]Fm7[/ch] [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
Come   back  to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Eb[/ch]   [ch]Fm7add4[/ch]
Come back[/tab]


[Spoken Interlude]
[tab][ch]Fm7add4[/ch]
Please come back to me, I miss you so much, Wherever you are, I love you[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch] [ch]Fmadd4/Ab[/ch] [ch]G7#5[/ch]         [ch]Ebmadd4/Gb[/ch] [ch]F7#5[/ch]
All     my     life, I've waited[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Emaj7b5[/ch]          [ch]Ebsus[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch]
To see your smile again[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch] [ch]Fmadd4/Ab[/ch] [ch]G7#5[/ch]         [ch]Ebmadd4/Gb[/ch] [ch]F7#5[/ch]
In    my       mind, I've     hated[/tab]
[tab][ch]Emaj7b5[/ch]
Not able to let go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Emaj7b5[/ch]
Not able to let go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Emaj7b5[/ch]
Oh, no, I won't let you go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Emaj7b5[/ch]
No, oh[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]Emaj7b5[/ch]
I don't know what else to say[/tab]
[tab][ch]Emaj7b5[/ch]
No, no, no, no[/tab]
